name: MGE ENERGY INC
business: MGE Energy operates in regulated electric and gas utility operations, nonregulated energy operations, transmission investments, and all other segments. The company distributes electricity in a 264 square-mile area of Dane County, Wisconsin, and supplies natural gas. Electric operations accounted for approximately 72% of total regulated revenues in 2025.

exposures.sentence: MGE distributes electricity in a service area covering a 264 square-mile area of Dane County, Wisconsin.
Regulated gas utility operations purchasing and distributing natural gas through MGE.
The forecasted capital expenditures include approximately 252 MW of solar, 18 MW of wind, and 125 MW of storage, which include projects approved or pending PSCW approval.
The forecasted capital expenditures include approximately 252 MW of solar, 18 MW of wind, and 125 MW of storage, which include projects approved or pending PSCW approval.
MGE Energy derived approximately 6.6% and 7.4% of net income for 2025 and 2024, respectively, from the investment in ATC.
In October 2025, MGE, along with the plant co-owners, filed a joint application with the PSCW to end the use of coal as a primary fuel at the Elm Road Units and transition the plant to natural gas.
Management is seeing growing interest from large load customers, including data intensive and technology focused operations, seeking reliable and scalable electric service in our service territory.

catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the PSCW approved a unanimous settlement agreement that MGE reached with intervening parties in its 2026/2027 rate case.
In January 2026, MGE issued $90 million of long-term debt.
Paris solar was placed in service in December 2024
Darien solar was placed in service in March 2025
Paris battery was placed in service in June 2025

catalysts.event: Filed joint application for Elm Road natural gas conversion
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, MGE, along with the plant co-owners, filed a joint application with the PSCW to end the use of coal as a primary fuel at the Elm Road Units and transition the plant to natural gas.

catalysts.event: Executed asset purchase agreement for RockGen Energy Center
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, MGE executed an asset purchase agreement to acquire 33.4% ownership interest in the RockGen Energy Center
